hero.title: Enterprise-Grade CQRS Mediator
hero.description: A high-performance, feature-rich alternative to MediatR with explicit CQRS separation, built-in Result pattern, and 11 attribute-driven pipeline behaviors.

features.title: Built for Production
features.subtitle: Everything you need to build robust, maintainable .NET applications with CQRS pattern.

cqrs.title: Explicit CQRS Types
cqrs.description: Separate ICommand<T> and IQuery<T> interfaces enforce architectural boundaries at compile time.

result.title: Result Pattern
result.description: Functional Result<T> with Map, Bind, Match operations. No exceptions for control flow.

pipeline.title: 11 Pipeline Behaviors
pipeline.description: Attribute-driven behaviors for audit, logging, validation, caching, retry, and more.

performance.title: High Performance
performance.description: Zero-reflection hot path with compiled expression trees and ValueTask-based async.

aspnetcore.title: ASP.NET Core Integration
aspnetcore.description: Declarative HTTP endpoint mapping with [HttpEndpoint] attribute and auto-discovery.

streaming.title: Streaming Support
streaming.description: IAsyncEnumerable streaming with full pipeline behavior support for real-time data.

benchmarks.title: Performance That Matters
benchmarks.subtitle: Benchmarked against MediatR v12 with BenchmarkDotNet. Real numbers, real workloads.

pipeline.title: Powerful Pipeline Architecture
pipeline.subtitle: 11 attribute-driven behaviors with explicit ordering. Just decorate your commands and queries.

audit.title: Audit
audit.description: Async batching with sensitive data masking

exception.title: Exception Handling
exception.description: Safety net with structured error capture

comparison.title: Why Qorpe Mediator?
comparison.subtitle: A detailed comparison with MediatR to help you make an informed decision.

quickStart.title: Get Started in Minutes
quickStart.subtitle: Add Qorpe Mediator to your project and start building with CQRS patterns right away.

footer.description: Enterprise-grade CQRS Mediator library for .NET. Built with performance and developer experience in mind.
